description: Forwarded email containing a deadline the user needs to act on
subject: Fwd: Summer camp registration closes Friday
body:
---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Camp Sunshine <noreply@campsunshine.org>
Date: Mon, Apr 21, 2026
Subject: Summer camp registration closes Friday
To: greg@example.com

Dear Parent,

Just a reminder that online registration for Summer 2026 closes this Friday, April 25th. Space is limited.

Register at: campsunshine.org/register

Fee: $350 due at registration.

---
Camp Sunshine · 123 Camp Rd, Lake Placid NY 12946
Unsubscribe | Privacy Policy

description: Forwarded bill that needs to be paid
subject: Fwd: Your bill is ready – City Water Dept
body:
---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: City Water <billing@citywater.gov>
Date: Tue, Apr 22, 2026
Subject: Your bill is ready
To: greg@example.com

Your water bill for April is $74.20 and is due by May 5, 2026.

Pay online at: citywater.gov/pay

---
City Water Department · 456 Municipal Blvd, Springfield
To unsubscribe from billing notices, visit your account settings.

description: Forwarded school email with an action required
subject: Fwd: Permission slip due Thursday – Field trip to museum
body:
---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Jefferson Elementary <no-reply@jefferson.edu>
Date: Mon, Apr 20, 2026
Subject: Permission slip due Thursday
To: greg@example.com

Dear Families,

Please return the signed permission slip for the science museum field trip by Thursday, April 24th. You may also sign digitally at parent.jefferson.edu.

The trip is Friday April 25th. Students should bring a bag lunch.

---
Jefferson Elementary School · 789 School St, Springfield
Powered by SchoolMessenger
